checks.name: JSON:API target struct implements relationship interfaces
checks.evidence: external/data/equipment/rest.go:9-30 declares RestModel without SetToOneReferenceID/SetToManyReferenceIDs and with GetName()=='equipment'; atlas-data emits type:'statistics' with a slots toMany relationship (services/atlas-data/atlas.com/data/equipment/rest.go:50-52, 67-110). Reference correct client at services/atlas-character-factory/atlas.com/character-factory/data/item_requests.go:15,33-34.

checks.name: httptest-backed integration test exists
checks.evidence: character/initializer_test.go:64-67 + character/stubs_test.go:173-195 do spin up httptest.NewServer for atlas-data, but the stub returns type:'equipment' with no relationships block — matching the broken client, not the real upstream. cache_test.go bypasses unmarshal via swapFetcher (cache_test.go:14-27).

checks.name: Errors distinguish 404 from other failures
checks.evidence: external/data/equipment/cache.go:117-122 collapses every fetcher error (404, decode failure, 5xx, transport) into a single WARN + (zero,false) return; no errors.Is(err, requests.ErrNotFound) branch.

checks.name: Service URL not hardcoded; uses RootUrl(domain)
checks.evidence: external/data/equipment/requests.go:14-23 — requests.RootUrl("DATA").

checks.name: builder.go exists
checks.evidence: Service uses Redis-backed Model with NewModel + With* chain (character/model.go:127-238); pre-existing.

checks.name: ToEntity() method
checks.evidence: No GORM persistence; Redis via atlas.TenantRegistry (character/registry.go:20).

checks.name: Make(Entity) function
checks.evidence: Same as DOM-02.

checks.name: Transform function
checks.evidence: stat.Transform consumed by character/resource.go:37.

checks.name: TransformSlice function
checks.evidence: Single-record GET only.

checks.name: Processor accepts FieldLogger
checks.evidence: character/processor.go:44 — NewProcessor(l logrus.FieldLogger, ctx context.Context).

checks.name: Handlers pass d.Logger()
checks.evidence: character/resource.go:30 — NewProcessor(d.Logger(), d.Context()).

checks.name: POST/PATCH use RegisterInputHandler
checks.evidence: Service exposes only GET endpoints (character/resource.go:21).

checks.name: Transform errors handled
checks.evidence: stat.Transform has no error return in current signature.

checks.name: Test DB has tenant callbacks
checks.evidence: No SQL DB; Redis via miniredis.RunT(t) (character/processor_test.go:22).

checks.name: Providers use lazy evaluation
checks.evidence: Equipment Provider closure is lazy by construction (external/data/equipment/cache.go:25,111-125).

checks.name: No os.Getenv() in handlers
checks.evidence: Grep of character/*.go and external/data/equipment/*.go finds zero non-test os.Getenv.

checks.name: No cross-domain logic in handlers
checks.evidence: character/resource.go:25-45 calls own processor only.

checks.name: Handlers don't call providers directly
checks.evidence: Handler calls NewProcessor().GetEffectiveStats() only.

checks.name: No direct entity creation in handlers
checks.evidence: No DB writes anywhere.

checks.name: administrator.go exists for write ops
checks.evidence: No SQL persistence layer.

checks.name: Domain error → HTTP status mapping
checks.evidence: character/resource.go:32-34 — single GET returns 500 on error; pre-existing for read-through cache.

checks.name: JSON:API interface on REST models
checks.evidence: external/character/rest.go:28-43, external/data/equipment/rest.go:19-30 implement GetName/GetID/SetID. (Note: equipment additionally fails EXT-01.)

checks.name: Request models use flat structure
checks.evidence: No request models — read-only service.

checks.name: Table-driven tests
checks.evidence: character/qualification_test.go:16-49 uses table pattern; other tests are scenario-style (acceptable for state-machine logic).

checks.name: No duplication of atlas-constants types
checks.evidence: WearerProfile, EquippedAsset, EquipmentRequirements, AppliedStats, Provider, fetcher are service-local concepts; WearerProfile correctly stores job.Id (character/wearer.go:9). Warning-level: wearerClassMask (character/qualification.go:30) is a domain-meaningful v83 reqJob bitmask that should move to libs/atlas-constants/job/ if any second service ever needs it.

checks.name: Model immutability via shallowCopy + With* methods
checks.evidence: character/model.go:240-254; every With* uses shallowCopy. withQualifiedSnapshot is package-private (line 234).

checks.name: Defensive copy of equipped map on mutation
checks.evidence: character/model.go:256-262 copyEquipped invoked in WithEquippedAsset (220) and WithoutEquippedAsset (228).

checks.name: Equipped() returns map copy
checks.evidence: character/model.go:87-93 builds fresh map; EquippedAsset.Bonuses() (equipped_asset.go:30-34) is also defensive.

checks.name: qualifiedSnapshot treated as read-only
checks.evidence: shared by reference across shallowCopy (model.go:249); withQualifiedSnapshot accepts caller's map without defensive copy. Both call sites (Recompute line 355, RecomputeWith line 363) pass freshly-allocated maps so contract holds today.

checks.name: JSON round-trip with string-keyed maps
checks.evidence: character/model.go:377-415 (Marshal) and 417-463 (Unmarshal) convert map[uint32]X ↔ map[string]X via strconv. Test character/model_test.go:450-487 covers wearer + equipped + qualifiedSnapshot.

checks.name: Equipment cache uses RWMutex + sync.Once
checks.evidence: external/data/equipment/cache.go:45-60.

checks.name: Cache is tenant-scoped
checks.evidence: Nested map[uuid.UUID]map[uint32]EquipmentRequirements keyed by tenant.MustFromContext(ctx).Id() (cache.go:47, 62-82, 113); test cache_test.go:76-90.

checks.name: SeedForTest / ResetCacheForTest surface size acceptable
checks.evidence: Minimum viable surface (cache.go:92-105); ForTest suffix; mutable defaultFetcher var swapped via swapFetcher (cache_test.go:14-27) is acceptable.

checks.name: wearerClassMask reqJob mapping correct
checks.evidence: character/qualification.go:30-48; covers Explorer 100/200/300/400/500, Cygnus 1100..1500, Aran 2100..2112, Evan 2200..2218, Beginner/Noblesse/Legend → 0; tested by character/qualification_test.go:16-49.

blocking: EXT-01: external/data/equipment/rest.go:19 — RestModel.GetName()=='equipment' but atlas-data emits type:'statistics'; missing SetToOneReferenceID / SetToManyReferenceIDs no-op stubs causes api2go.Unmarshal to fail on the slots toMany relationship.

EXT-03: external/data/equipment/cache.go:117-122 — fetcher errors are not classified; ErrNotFound and decode/transport/5xx are handled identically as 'unqualified', silently masking deploy bugs (including EXT-01).
nonBlocking: EXT-02: character/initializer_test.go:28-62, character/stubs_test.go:173-195 — data stub returns the broken shape ('type':'equipment', no relationships block); cannot regression-test EXT-01.
DOM-21: character/qualification.go:30-48 — wearerClassMask v83 reqJob bitmask is service-local; promote to libs/atlas-constants/job/ if any second service needs reqJob enforcement.
MOD-COPY-QS: character/model.go:233-238 — withQualifiedSnapshot accepts map without defensive copy; safe today because callers pass fresh maps and the method is package-private.
